$comment: Registry of all available decks. To add a new deck: add an entry here and drop a matching data/decks/<id>.json question file plus a logo in assets/img/decks/. Set "card" to "dark" when the logo is light-coloured so it shows on a black card (defaults to "light").

decks.name: BigTalk
decks.title: Make Big Talk
decks.tagline: Skip the small talk. Ask something that matters.

decks.name: Bad People
decks.title: Bad People
decks.tagline: Find out what your friends really think of you.

decks.name: Bad Choices
decks.title: Bad Choices
decks.tagline: The questions you'd never normally ask out loud.

decks.name: Couples
decks.title: Couples Quiz
decks.tagline: For two people who think they know each other.
